project.name: WEB_PhotoVerify
project.philosophy: Democratic Forensic Suite for web browsers and Chrome-based applications. Sovereignty first: 100% local processing.
project.architecture: React 19 + TypeScript 5 (PWA) with LocalStorage and IndexedDB support.

scientific_layers.name: Invisible Stamp (LSB+)
scientific_layers.functional: Verbergt een unieke 6-cijferige code direct in de pixel-luminantie.
scientific_layers.technical: 4-bit differential encoding in de blauwe kanalen van de interior pixels. Stable against re-saves.
scientific_layers.logic: Auto-generated 6-character hex code based on (Date.now() XOR Math.random()). Offered fresh on each shield entry unless a hard default is set.

scientific_layers.name: Visual DNA (pHash)
scientific_layers.functional: Identificeert het 'concept' van de foto, ongeacht kleine wijzigingen.
scientific_layers.technical: DCT-based Perceptual Hashing (16x16 grid). Vergelijking via Hamming Distance.
scientific_layers.logic: Calculated on the cropped interior to ensure consistency with the stamped data.

components.design: Web-optimized card layout for desktop and laptop screens.
Gebruikt IndexedDB voor grotere bestanden en LocalStorage voor configuratie.
